form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr3) over 1780m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 12 m by Prince Joy (2:10.70) in 3yo+ NR 41 to 46 on March 25 at $11. At the start before game effort when 3rd (Sr1) over 2040m at this track, beaten 2.5 m by Rightyo (2:31.80) in 3yo+ NR 40 to 44 on March 18 at $5.50. Capable of more than he has shown recently. Solid top-three hope.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing fifth after being driven well back, behind Prince Joy at this track over 1780m in a 3yo+ NR 41 to 46 on March 25 at $2. Recent form sound and he should be in the finish.
